title: The Span Of Life
content:
The old dog barks backwards without getting up.
I can remember when he was a pup.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Lee Frost, titled "The Span Of Life", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
